_comment: Example games-map for Slot Demos Cascade. Each entry maps a game key to provider-specific configurations. Add your own games and provider slugs here.

starburst._comment: Generic example: NetEnt classic. Replace 'direct' value with actual provider's demo URL pattern.

book-of-dead._comment: Generic example: Play'n GO. Each provider key below is optional; only configured providers will be tried in cascade order.

gates-of-olympus._comment: Generic example: Pragmatic Play. Use Push Gaming's official demo CDN if you want this provider.
